pr.title: docs(install): document Cursor / ChatGPT / Continue install paths + ship .cursor/mcp.json
pr.body:
## Summary

Production already documents Claude Code, GitHub Copilot CLI, Gemini CLI, and Codex CLI as first-class installation surfaces. This PR fills in the remaining MCP-spec-compliant clients (Cursor, ChatGPT via Apps SDK, Continue / Cline / generic clients) without changing any of the already-documented ones.

## Changes

- New `.cursor/mcp.json` at the repo root — minimal config pointing at `https://api.kobiton.com/mcp` so Cursor users get a working install without hand-crafting one.
- `.gitignore` — narrowed from blanket `.cursor` to `.cursor/*` + `!.cursor/mcp.json` so the rest of `.cursor/` stays ignored.
- README "Installation" → new "Other MCP Clients" subsection at the bottom, covering:
  - **Cursor** — config + reference to `.cursor/mcp.json`
  - **ChatGPT (Apps SDK)** — HTTPS endpoint registration
  - **Continue / Cline / other generic MCP clients** — Streamable HTTP config
- Honest framing on every config: *"derived from each client's published documentation; Kobiton-side OAuth flow is the same across all of them. End-to-end tested only on Claude Code, Copilot CLI, Gemini CLI, and Codex CLI; entries below are configs we expect to work but have not yet validated — please open an issue if any do not work for your setup."*
- `CHANGELOG.md`: `## Unreleased` entry.

No changes to the existing Installation subsections (Claude Code, Copilot CLI, Gemini CLI, Codex CLI). No changes to runtime behavior.

## Type of change

- [x] Documentation update

## Checklist

- [x] \`pnpm run validate\` passes
- [x] \`pnpm test\` passes (38 tests)
- [ ] New tools have \`title\`, \`annotations\` (\`readOnlyHint\`, \`destructiveHint\`), and \`inputSchema\` — n/a
- [ ] New skills have YAML frontmatter with \`name\` and \`description\` — n/a
- [x] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [x] README.md updated (new "Other MCP Clients" subsection)

## Related issues

Mirrors fork PR [jeremylongshore/automate#43](https://github.com/jeremylongshore/automate/pull/43) (merged to fork main 2026-05-12), trimmed to the deltas that production doesn't already cover (since v1.2.0 shipped Copilot CLI / Gemini CLI / Codex CLI as first-class).

Part of the R3 §4/§5 reference-implementation batch landing as a series of small PRs against `production`, smallest-first.

Signed-off-by: Jeremy Longshore <jeremy@intentsolutions.io>

- Jeremy Longshore
intentsolutions.io
pr.author: jeremylongshore
